final_recommendation.description_ru: Первично-коммутируемый источник питания серии QUINT POWER для монтажа на DIN-рейку с технологией SFB (Selective Fuse Breaking), защитным покрытием печатной платы и встроенным развязывающим MOSFET; вход: 1-фазный 85–264 В AC, выход: 24 В DC / 20 А. Производитель — Phoenix Contact, а не Honeywell.

specs.special_features: SFB Technology, conformal PCB coating, integrated decoupling MOSFET, NFC interface, dynamic boost 200% for 5s, static boost 125%, mains failure buffer >20ms
certifications: UL ANSI/ISA-12.12.01 Class I Div 2 Groups A/B/C/D

key_findings: CRITICAL: Part number 2904617 belongs to Phoenix Contact, NOT Honeywell. No Honeywell product with PN=2904617 was found on any source.
The product is Phoenix Contact QUINT4-PS/1AC/24DC/20/+, a 4th-generation QUINT POWER DIN-rail power supply.
Confirmed as CURRENT (Commercialized) product status on manufacturer website phoenixcontact.com.
Publicly listed price: ~$633.36 USD per piece (IEC Supply, Power/Mation); $587.35 list / $489.46 discounted at RSP Supply.
Key specs: Input 85–264 V AC (1-phase), Output 24 V DC / 20 A, 480 W rated power, 92.7% efficiency, IP20, DIN-rail mount, metal housing.
Features SFB Technology (Selective Fuse Breaking), conformal PCB protective coating for extreme environments, and integrated decoupling MOSFET.
Multiple authorized distributors (RS Components, IEC Supply, Southern Controls, Power/Mation) stock this part.
No Honeywell-branded product or Honeywell catalog entry for PN 2904617 was found anywhere in the search results.
ambiguities: The requested brand 'Honeywell' does NOT match part number 2904617. This PN is exclusively a Phoenix Contact part number. The brand in the request may be an error or misattribution.
Price varies by distributor ($489–$653 USD range); tariffs may apply for US imports depending on origin (Thailand).
A direct image CDN URL could not be extracted from the manufacturer page without rendering JavaScript; the manufacturer product page URL is provided instead.
final_recommendation.confidence_notes: Part number 2904617 is definitively and consistently identified as Phoenix Contact QUINT4-PS/1AC/24DC/20/+ across the manufacturer's own website and 6+ independent authorized distributors. Confidence in product identity is HIGH. Confidence that this part does NOT belong to Honeywell is also HIGH — zero sources associate PN 2904617 with Honeywell. The brand field in the original request is incorrect.
